text: The transition from an open, quiet, and sterile space to a colorful, immersive wall of ideas is disorienting yet invigorating. In the first scene, the emptiness feels like potential, making me reflect on beginnings, anticipation, and my own presence within the architecture. In the second scene, I am surrounded by creativity and human curiosity—the R+D wall reminds me of our endless pursuit to make sense of the world. Here, I feel curiosity swelling within me, a sense of longing to learn and participate, mingled with the humility of standing before something larger than myself.
